title: Air Hockey 3D with Time Control
prompt:
Create a complete single-file HTML page with a 3D air hockey game using Three.js that includes time-control mechanics. Follow these specifications precisely:

## Scene Setup
- Use a perspective camera at position (0, 12, 10) looking down at the table at angle.
- Add ambient light (intensity 0.5) and a directional light from above (position 0, 15, 5, intensity 1.0).
- The air hockey table is a flat rectangular box: width=10, depth=16, height=0.3, centered at origin, colored #1a6b3a (green felt). Add white boundary walls (height 0.5, thickness 0.2) around all four edges.
- Goals: Two open slots on the short edges (z = -8 and z = +8), each 3 units wide centered at x=0. Remove the wall segment there.
- The puck is a cylinder (radius 0.4, height 0.15) colored #111111, starting at (0, 0.3, 0).
- Player paddle: a cylinder (radius 0.6, height 0.2) colored #ff3333, starting at (0, 0.3, 6).
- AI paddle: a cylinder (radius 0.6, height 0.2) colored #3333ff, starting at (0, 0.3, -6).

## 3D Asset
- Load '._horse.glb' using GLTFLoader from a CDN. Place the horse model as a trophy decoration on the side of the table at position (7, 0.3, 0), scaled to (0.5, 0.5, 0.5). The horse should slowly rotate on the Y-axis (0.5 rad/s). When a player scores, the horse should briefly jump (translate Y up by 2 over 0.5s then back down).

## Physics (custom implementation, no physics engine)
- Puck moves with velocity (vx, vz). Apply friction factor 0.998 per frame.
- Puck bounces off walls with coefficient of restitution 0.9. Reflect the appropriate velocity component.
- Puck-paddle collision: treat as circle-circle. On collision, puck velocity = normalized(puck.pos - paddle.pos) * (puck_speed + 2). Minimum post-collision speed = 3.
- Puck speed is clamped to max 20 units/s.
- If puck enters a goal (|x| < 1.5 and z < -8 or z > 8), score a point for the appropriate player and reset puck to center with zero velocity.

## Time Control
- Implement a time scale variable (default 1.0).
- Press 'Q' to set timeScale = 0.25 (slow motion). Press 'W' to set timeScale = 1.0 (normal). Press 'E' to set timeScale = 2.0 (fast forward). Press 'Space' to toggle pause (timeScale = 0).
- All physics and AI updates multiply their delta-time by timeScale.
- Display current time mode on HUD: 'SLOW-MO', 'NORMAL', 'FAST', or 'PAUSED'.

## Player Controls
- Player moves their paddle (the red one, near z=+6 side) using arrow keys or WASD (A/D for x, W_key already used for time so use arrow keys: Up/Down for z, Left/Right for x).
- Actually, remap: Arrow keys move the paddle. Left/Right = x movement, Up/Down = z movement. Paddle speed = 12 units/s.
- Constrain player paddle: x in [-4.5, 4.5], z in [0.5, 7.5] (player's half only).

## AI Opponent
- AI paddle tracks the puck's x position with a smoothing factor (lerp 0.03 * timeScale per frame toward puck x).
- AI z position oscillates between -6 and -2 based on puck z proximity.
- Constrain AI paddle: x in [-4.5, 4.5], z in [-7.5, -0.5].

## Scoring & Game State
- First to 5 points wins. Display 'PLAYER WINS!' or 'AI WINS!' and stop the game.
- On goal: flash the table color to white for 0.3s then back to green.

## HUD (DOM overlay)
- Top-left: 'Player: X' score in red, font-size 24px, id='player-score'.
- Top-right: 'AI: X' score in blue, font-size 24px, id='ai-score'.
- Top-center: time mode label, id='time-mode', font-size 20px, yellow text.
- Center: game-over message, id='game-over-msg', hidden until game ends, font-size 48px white text.
- Bottom-center: 'Q=SlowMo W=Normal E=Fast SPACE=Pause', id='controls-hint', font-size 14px, gray.

## State Management
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ with these fields updated every frame:
- playerScore: number (0-5)
- aiScore: number (0-5)
- puckX: number (puck x position)
- puckZ: number (puck z position)
- puckVX: number (puck x velocity)
- puckVZ: number (puck z velocity)
- puckSpeed: number (magnitude of puck velocity)
- playerPaddleX: number
- playerPaddleZ: number
- aiPaddleX: number
- aiPaddleZ: number
- timeScale: number (0, 0.25, 1.0, or 2.0)
- timeMode: string ('PAUSED', 'SLOW-MO', 'NORMAL', 'FAST')
- gameOver: boolean
- winner: string ('' or 'PLAYER' or 'AI')
- horseLoaded: boolean (true once GLTF model loaded)
- horseRotationY: number (current Y rotation of horse)
- frameCount: number (incremented each animation frame)
- paused: boolean
physics_constraints: Puck friction 0.998/frame, wall restitution 0.9, circle-circle paddle-puck collision, max puck speed 20, min post-collision speed 3. Time scale affects all physics. Paddle constrained to own half.
